name: Auckland International Airport Limited
analysis: AIA has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 9% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$6.9900. Trade idea: entry A$7.0100, stop A$6.6132, target A$8.2004 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
